name: IdsEdwMdlPolAmndmntDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: with cte_source as ( select S.MDL_POL_AMNDMNT_SK, S.MDL_DOC_ID, S.POL_NO, S.AMNDMNT_ID, S.AMNDMNT_EFF_DT, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.MDL_DOC_SK, S.AMNDMNT_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN, S.AMNDMNT_STTUS_ID, S.AMNDMNT_TERM_DT, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as source_CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as source_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MDL_POL_AMNDMNT S where S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} ) select MDL_POL_AMNDMNT_SK, MDL_DOC_ID, POL_NO, AMNDMNT_ID, AMNDMNT_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, MDL_DOC_SK, AMNDMNT_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN, AMNDMNT_STTUS_ID, AMNDMNT_TERM_DT, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, source_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK from cte_source
